name: Re: Potluck Dishes Request
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet, cook the ground beef over medium heat until browned.
2. Add the chopped peppers and onions; cook until vegetables are softened.
3. Stir in the soup, black olives, salsa, and water. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and prepare the corn muffin mix according to package instructions.
6. Spread half of the prepared corn muffin batter into a greased baking dish.
7. Spoon the hot meat mixture over the muffin batter.
8. Carefully spread the remaining muffin batter over the top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until the muffin layer is golden brown.
10. Top with shredded Cojack cheese and garnish with chopped olives and tomatoes.
397 calories - 19 grams fat
